## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/build

## Risk

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Verification

Commands or checks run:

```text

```

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the stated problem.
- [ ] I updated docs or comments when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where risk justifies it.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, tokens, or private user data are included.
- [ ] AI-assisted work was reviewed by a human before submission.
